message:
feat(ft-conformance): replace wait_with_output with threaded stream capture, timeout polling, and child reaping for legacy oracle

Refactor run_legacy_oracle_script to spawn dedicated reader threads for
stdout/stderr with capped buffers and an atomic overflow flag that
triggers early child termination. Add a non-blocking polling loop with
configurable timeout (MAX_LEGACY_ORACLE_WAIT_MILLIS) that kills the
subprocess on expiry, and a terminate_and_reap_child helper to guarantee
zombie cleanup on every error path. Introduce stdin size validation
(MAX_LEGACY_ORACLE_STDIN_BYTES) before spawning, and expose
run_legacy_oracle_script_with_timeout for test-controlled deadlines.
Includes unit tests for capped stream reads, overflow signaling, timeout
behavior, and child reaping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
